ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "snp" TEXT /* SNP identifier */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome number */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant */,
  "effect_allele" TEXT /* Effect allele */,
  "other_allele" TEXT /* Other allele */,
  "rs_id" TEXT /* Reference SNP ID from dbSNP */,
  "allele_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the effect allele in the population */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the variant call */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  "trait_type" TEXT /* Type of the trait */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trait */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traits_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trait */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value */,
  "se" REAL /* Standard error */,
  "pval" REAL /* P-value */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the studies table */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the study */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the beta value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_associations_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_associations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_associations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposures" (
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "exposure_name" TEXT /* Name of the exposure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exposure */,
  "exposure_type" TEXT /* Type of exposure */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the exposure */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposures_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposures_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)
column_names: Frequency of the effect allele in the population
Quality score of the variant call
Foreign key to the sources table
